Aryna Sabalenka Dominates at Australian Open with 6-3 6-1 Win

Jan 22, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Aryna Sabalenka Dominates at Australian Open with 6-3 6-1 Win

Aryna Sabalenka continued her relentless pursuit of a third Melbourne crown on Wednesday, delivering a clinical performance at the Australian Open to secure her place in the third round. The WTA world number one dismantled Chinese qualifier Bai Zhuoxuan with a 6-3, 6-1 victory, asserting her authority early in the match at Rod Laver Arena.

While the scoreline reflects a dominant display, the opening set provided a brief moment of high drama as Sabalenka’s quest for perfection met a spirited resistance from her young opponent. Fans gathered at Melbourne Park tennis center were treated to a display of sheer power, as the Belarusian star looked to sharpen her game ahead of the more grueling rounds of the tournament. The win reinforces her status as the tournament favorite and keeps the top half of the draw buzzing with anticipation.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Aryna Sabalenka Dominates at Australian Open with 6-3 6-1 Win
